channel.title: Conraid - Slackware current packages
channel.description: Corrado Franco (Conraid) Slackware current package repository.

item.title: Sun, 29 Mar 2026 11:40:43 UTC
item.description:
libdatachannel-0.24.2-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Upgraded.
neovim-ad4bc2d-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Upgraded.
	Sticking with the development version 0.12 for compatibility
	with treesitter-0.26 in Slackware Current.

python-aws-cli-1.44.66-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Removed.
python-aws-cli2-2.34.18-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Added.
	This version is encapsulated in /opt/aws-cli2/ with its own
  dedicated Virtualenv to avoid dependency conflicts with system
  libraries. Please test it and let me know if everything is OK.

item.title: Fri, 20 Mar 2026 14:33:16 UTC
item.description:
Updated sbbdep to the latest development version.
I chose to include it because it's functional, up to date,
and requires no patches; it may also help the developer.
I use this software to identify package dependencies and
determine which ones need to be recompiled after updates.
docker-compose-5.1.1-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Upgraded.
exiftool-13.53-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Upgraded.

item.title: Wed, 18 Mar 2026 09:27:52 UTC
item.description:
Since Pat added QEMU to -current, I've removed it along with the packages
that were only needed for it. However, if any of those packages are still
useful for something else, please let me know.
Happy (virtual) Slack :)
device-tree-compiler-1.7.2-x86_64-2cf.txz:  Removed.
	It is now part of Slackware current with dtc name.
libde265-1.0.17-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Upgraded.
libnfs-5.0.3-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Removed.
	In my repository, it was only needed by QEMU.
libslirp-4.9.1-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Removed.
	In my repository, it was only needed by QEMU.
